reviews.comment:
La ficha para aspirar el auto es carìsima, 40 pesos dos minutos y para tener decente el auto necesitas mínimo 3, bajen el precio o por el mismo  pongan a alguien para que haga el trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
The price for vacuuming the car is outrageous, 40 pesos for two minutes, and to keep the car decent you need at least three minutes. Lower the price or for the same price hire someone to do the job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeV9hNF93RRAB

reviews.comment:
No tiene cambiador de bebés. Tuve que cambiar a mi beba en el auto bajo el sol. Un desastre que no lo tengan en cuenta.

(Translated by Google)
There's no baby changing table. I had to change my baby in the car in the sun. It's a disaster that they didn't take that into account.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJdy1IYnJ3RRAB
